Invalid node-authored response: node-authored response was not valid JSON. Raw response excerpt: ```json
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "The child results provided were insufficient/invalid. I will solve the problem manually. The problem asks for the least prime p such that x^4 + 1 ≡ 0 (mod p^2) has a solution, and then the least m such that m^4 + 1 ≡ 0 (mod p^2). \n\n1. For x^4 + 1 ≡ 0 (mod p) to have a solution, p must be such that -1 is a 4th power residue. This requires p ≡ 1 (mod 8). ...
